creator: killing@multiplay.co.uk
text:
You may well be hitting something thats already got a proposed
fix upstream:
http://cr.illumos.org/~webrev/csiden/illumos-3970/

Might want to give that a go and see if it fixes it for you.

    Regards
    Steve
